evidenceNeededDraft: Identify the specific machine_guarding or workplace location involved.
Confirm whether physical or administrative safety controls for guarding are in place and operational.
Review training records, inspection checklists, or maintenance documentation relevant to machine_guarding.
Verify conformance with standard citations: 29 CFR 1910.212, 29 CFR 1910.219, 29 CFR 1910.147.
[Advisory Only] Qualified safety personnel must verify specific evidence requirements on-site.
correctiveActionPatternsDraft: Restrict access to or isolate any hazardous conditions related to guarding immediately.
Inspect, repair, or replace any defective components of the affected machine_guarding before returning to service.
Implement engineering, administrative, or PPE controls to minimize risks from guarding.
Instruct workers on safe practices regarding machine_guarding and verify procedural compliance.
Document corrective actions completed and ensure compliance with citations: 29 CFR 1910.212, 29 CFR 1910.219, 29 CFR 1910.147.
[Advisory Only] Corrective action details must be reviewed and approved by qualified safety managers or engineers.
applicabilityDraft: Applies to operations within jurisdiction: osha_general_industry.
Applies when task, activity, or condition involves machine_guarding or associated subsystems.
Applies when workers are exposed to guarding risks during normal or maintenance operations.
[Advisory Only] Scope of applicability must be validated by a qualified inspector or safety professional.
